internal_references.title: Implement bidirectional interactive mode
internal_references.relevance: Originated the existing NDJSON stream-json input pipe used for --tool claude. Source of bidirectional-interactive.lib.mjs and the three existing experimental flags.

internal_references.title: Refactor auto-merge into solve.auto-merge.lib.mjs
internal_references.relevance: Defines the shape of watchUntilMergeable and the shared restart utilities.

internal_references.title: Track actual AI restarts separately from check-cycle iterations
internal_references.relevance: The restart counter that streamUntilMergeable must not regress.

internal_references.title: Auto-restart usage-limit handling
internal_references.relevance: Usage-limit branch in watchUntilMergeable that resumes via --resume.

internal_references.title: Auto-restart consistency / minimum interval
internal_references.relevance: Sets MIN_CI_CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 120; same lower bound applies to streaming-mode poller.

internal_references.title: Auto-resume comment ordering
internal_references.relevance: Documented constraint that the parent must await child exit before posting solution-draft / ready-to-merge comments. The streaming loop must preserve this ordering.

internal_references.title: Ready-to-merge comment dedup
internal_references.relevance: The streaming path's settled-state should still post exactly one Ready to merge comment.

external_references.title: Claude Agent SDK overview
key_facts: Claude Code SDK was renamed to Claude Agent SDK.
Sessions can be resumed by capturing the session_id from a system 'init' event and passing it back as the resume option.
TypeScript and Python bindings expose the same headless agent loop the CLI uses.

external_references.title: Codex CLI non-interactive mode (exec)
key_facts: Codex `exec` accepts a prompt argument and stdin-piped context. If both are present, the prompt is the instruction and stdin is supplementary context.
Stdin can be the entire prompt via `codex exec -`.
Progress is emitted on stderr; stdout receives only the final agent message.
No documented mid-session NDJSON channel that would let new user turns be appended after exec has started.

external_references.title: openai/codex (CLI source)
key_facts: Repository README describes Codex CLI as a local coding agent and points to the docs site for input format details.
No public commitment to a stream-json input contract.
